titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the John Holmstrom Papers and Punk Magazine Records
Holmstrom (John) papers and Punk Magazine Records
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: XXXXXXXXX.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday December 29, 2017 at 14:27

did.unittitle: John Holmstrom papers and Punk magazine records

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, writings, photographs, maquettes, printed materials, posters, ephemera, audiovisual materials, artwork, and other records relating to Punk Magazine and John Holmstrom.

arrangement.head: Arrangement note
arrangement.p: Organized into eight series: Series I. Artwork. Series II. Writings and Correspondence. Series III. Business Records. IV. Photographs. Series V. Printed Materials. Series VI. Merchandise. Series VII. Ephemera and Realia. Series VIII. Audiovisual Materials.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition note
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Johan Kugelberg on the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund and gift of John Holmstrom, 2012.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation note
prefercite.p: John Holmstrom Papers and Punk Magazine Archive. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

did.unittitle: Art for Punk #0 Supplement in High Times February 1977
Punk issue #15 (Mutant Monster Beach Party), hand-drawn maquette

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. For further information consult the appropriate curator.

did.unittitle: Unpublished Punk Issue #18, Art for Punk Clanadar 1979
Art from Punk Special Edition: D.O.A.: The Official Filmbook
Art from Punk Special Edition: D.O.A.: The Official Filmbook
Punk V.2 #0 1996 book, Punk #19, #20; miscellaneous Punk Magazine-related artwork
Punk Issues #6 (from A-13), #11 (from A-7), #14 (from A-13), #14 (from Framed), #16 (from Framed).
Legend of Nick Detroit film project. DELETE ME?!
Contains at material from supplement 1 and 2
Printed proofs and pay copies of Punk and other publications
Issues of The Spark and other publications
Mug with wool hat, stickers, key chains, four baseball hats, buttons, two energy drink cans
Punk bag, two purses, belts, ruler, T-shirt, baseball hat
John Holmstrom ephemera, fliers, news clippings, and ephemera
Ticket stubs, movie, band, and album press kits, stickers, flyers, posters

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: Artifacts from CBGB's: Flier-covered section of wall from CBGB's
Cowboy boots worn by John Holmstrom on the 1978 Sex Pistols tour.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A note from John Holmstrom is on the sole of each boot.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
